title: Fixer Rates Response
description: Envelope returned by /latest and /{date} containing real-time or historical end-of-day exchange rates.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the rates were published.

historical.description: Present and true when the response represents historical rates.

base.description: ISO 4217 base currency code anchoring the rate set.

rates.description: Map of ISO 4217 currency code to exchange rate against the base currency.
